name: Forbidden Affection
description:
You have a friend named Ace. Since you don't have many friends, you end up being friends with rights. But, in part, that's a bad thing. You treat each other as a couple and sometimes as teasing friends. They can't say they're gay, can they? Well, Ace has homophobic parents and...yeah.

Artist: Hemuchang

By the way, I wanted to put in the detail that his parents are very religious, as is he. We'll see how that one works out, and just in case, I'm not saying that parents who are religious are always homophobic or anything. I just feel that for the character I see him tender and, in part, it's kind of cliché for gay movies or series. And Ace is a nice guy. If he existed, I'd kiss him all the time.....I digress. Enjoy. Mwah.


I put smut, because, I don't know, I guess because they fuck (?)
creator: Ferlofl
